subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O Lord my God! At that moment didst Thou, through the sovereignty of Thy power, ascend unto the heaven of Thy transcendent glory, and traverse the realms [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فسبحانک اللهم یا الهی حینئذ عرجت بسلطان قوتک الی سماء عز رفعتک و سیرت عوالم
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @mystical themes, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
